outcome.notes: Step 5: clearing OR typing something else in EITHER number field does not reset the result. The result display stays showing the previous value instead of clearing to the placeholder. Scope: not specific to the first field — both number fields exhibit it, and even editing (not just clearing) fails to reset the result. The number fields themselves accept input and clearing fine; the bug is isolated to the result display not resetting.

steps.description: Clearing or editing either number field does not reset the result; the result display keeps the previous value instead of clearing. Both fields affected; editing also fails to reset. Number fields accept input/clearing — only the result display fails to reset.
